task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Case form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM 'Create Case' page is visible in the web browser, showing empty fields for a new support case.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Subject for the case
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field contains exactly 'Data pipeline latency spike after v4.1 upgrade'.
The Account Name field is populated with 'NVIDIA Corporation'.

task_completion.description: Set the Priority, Status, and Type fields correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority dropdown is set to 'High', the Status dropdown is set to 'New', and the Type dropdown is set to 'Product'.

task_completion.description: Enter the detailed description of the issue
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains the text starting with 'Following the v4.1 platform upgrade deployed on February 8...' and ending with '...Reverting to v4.0 is not an option'.
A confirmation screen, the case detail view showing the saved information, or the Cases list view displaying the new case for NVIDIA Corporation.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the case
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or cURL commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard SuiteCRM layout, navigation menus, and styling are visible, confirming the data was not just typed into a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly inserting the record into the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values are used for the case: Subject: 'Data pipeline latency spike after v4.1 upgrade', Account Name: 'NVIDIA Corporation', Priority: 'High', Status: 'New', Type: 'Product'.
